name: Dialogue Close-Up
description: Two characters in tight dialogue — character consistency and lip sync matter most.

shot.description: Elena and Marcus face each other across a candlelit table. Elena leans forward, speaking softly.
shot.prompt: Cinematic close-up of a woman leaning toward a man across a candlelit dinner table, warm amber lighting, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, photorealistic

notes: Should favor providers with strong character consistency and photorealism (openai, luma).
